source.title: How does a Star Atlas player benefit by using Jupiter aggregator?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “How does a Star Atlas player benefit by using Jupiter aggregator?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
The new feature, available directly in the Star Atlas web interface, provides Star Atlas players with an enhanced gaming experience, combining cutting-edge real-time graphics and a secure, serverless blockchain ecosystem with Jupiter's swap aggregation and real-time precise price data.
Learn more by visiting the official Jupiter Integrator FAQ.

claims.text: The new feature, available directly in the Star Atlas web interface, provides Star Atlas players with an enhanced gaming experience, combining cutting-edge real-time graphics and a secure, serverless blockchain ecosystem with Jupiter's swap aggregation and real-time precise price data.
